title: Savory Gooey Syrian Lamb Stir-fry
description: This savory and gooey dish features lamb cooked to perfection with the perfect balance of tangy lemon juice, ensuring a deliciously nostalgic meal that's both comforting and satisfying.

ingredients.name: water or low sodium chicken broth

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add onion and garlic to the pan; cook until softened and translucent, stirring occasionally.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for another minute. Gradually add water/broth while continuously stirring to prevent sticking.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add lamb mince. Cook until browned on all sides, breaking up lumps with a wooden spoon as it cooks.
Season the stew with salt, lemon juice, and red pepper flakes according to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley and torn cilantro leaves if desired before serving hot.
